{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-35373", "cvss": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-176", "name": "Improper Handling of Unicode Encoding"}], "description": "In target-directory forms (`ln SOURCE... DIRECTORY`), `ln` rejects source paths with non-UTF-8 filename bytes, while GNU accepts them. Breaks GNU compatibility for byte-oriented filenames on Unix filesystems.

PoC:
```
name=$(printf 'bad_\377'); mkdir dst; : > "$name"; ln "$name" dst
# GNU: exit 0, creates dst/bad_\377 ; uutils: exit 1, dst empty
```

---
_Zellic private finding (zellic-ext/coreutils-private PR #84). Reported in the Zellic *uutils coreutils Program Security Assessment* (for Canonical, Jan 2026), audited commit `3a07ffc5a9bd4c283e75afa548ba1f1957bad242`._", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00121, "percentile": 0.02224}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-06T19:53:39Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-35373"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-06T19:53:39Z", "references": ["https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/security/advisories/GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35373", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/11403", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/uutils/coreutils/security-advisories/GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "ln: rejects non-UTF-8 source filenames in target-directory mode", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:53:40Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jcjr-rh8q-7xqf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.6.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "uu_ln"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.6.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: ln: rejects non-UTF-8 source filenames in target-directory mode
